allow: Bash(zsh .claude/scripts/init-claude-config.sh --auto ~/Workspace/identity-hub 2>&1 | head -8 && echo "---" && zsh .claude/scripts/init-claude-config.sh --auto ~/Workspace/maxai-b2c-backend 2>&1 | head -8 && echo "---" && zsh .claude/scripts/init-claude-config.sh --auto ~/Workspace/identity-hub-frontend 2>&1 | head -8)

Bash(zsh -c '
setopt null_glob
dir="$HOME/Workspace/maxai-b2c-backend"
_find_file\(\) {
    local base="$1" name="$2"
    [[ -f "$base/$name" ]] && { echo "$base/$name"; return; }
    find "$base" -maxdepth 2 -name "$name" -not -path "*/.git/*" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/vendor/*" 2>/dev/null | head -1
}
echo "pyproject: $\(_find_file "$dir" "pyproject.toml"\)"
echo "gradle: $\(_find_file "$dir" "build.gradle.kts"\)"
echo "pom: $\(_find_file "$dir" "pom.xml"\)"
echo "package: $\(_find_file "$dir" "package.json"\)"
echo "composer: $\(_find_file "$dir" "composer.json"\)"
')

Bash(zsh .claude/scripts/init-claude-config.sh --auto ~/Workspace/maxai-b2c-backend 2>&1 | head -10 && echo "===" && zsh .claude/scripts/init-claude-config.sh --auto ~/Workspace/speakingmax-backend 2>&1 | head -10 && echo "===" && zsh .claude/scripts/init-claude-config.sh --auto ~/Workspace/identity-hub 2>&1 | head -10 && echo "===" && zsh .claude/scripts/init-claude-config.sh --auto ~/Workspace/identity-hub-frontend 2>&1 | head -10)
